description_long: This rifle features a compact, modern bullpup design with a predominantly black and red color scheme accented by angular geometric patterns. The main body is robust and streamlined, with a large, circular drum magazine mounted at the rear, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The barrel is fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, extending the length and giving the weapon a tactical appearance. The stock is integrated into the body, typical of bullpup rifles, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. A raised sight rail is present on top, though no advanced optics are mounted, indicating reliance on basic iron sights. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, designed for durability and reduced weight in urban environments.
description: A compact, black and red bullpup rifle with a drum magazine, suppressor, and angular modern styling. Features an integrated stock and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, suppressor, angular body, and drum magazine on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular opening and the narrow, streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine's full circular shape and the rifle's detailed body contours.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the drum magazine and the compact, integrated stock design.
